title: S.O. No. 788(E) dated 07.09.1998- Reconstitution of Animal Welfare Board of India
description: S.O. No. 788(E) dated 07.09.1998- Reconstitution of Animal Welfare Board of India
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/98 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 581] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 8, 1998/BHADRA17,1920 2444 GI/98 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA.: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th September, 1998 S. O. 788 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) read with sub-section (1) of section 5 A of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 {59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby notifies the names of the following persons as the members on the Animal Welfare Board of India and for that purpose makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, Number S. O. 495 (E) dated, the 9th June, 1998, namely :— In the said notification, after serial number (19) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be inserted, namely:— "(20) (21) (22) Dr. S. Abdul Rahman, Secretary General Indian Veterinary Association, IV A, 123, 7th 'B' Main Road, IVBlock (West), Jayanagar, Bangalorc-560001. Shrimati CnandreshKumari, Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) 8, Ferozshah Road, New Delhi-110001. Shri Kanak Mai Katara, Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) 60, North Avenue, New Delhi-110001. Member under section 5(l)(c). Member under section 5(l)(i). Member under section 5(l)(i)." [F. No. 1-15/97-AW] SARWESHWAR JHA, Jt. Secy. Note :—The Notification reconstituting the Animal Welfare Board of India was published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) vide number S. O. 495 (E), dated the 9th June, 1998. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054— 1998. -- 2 of 2 --
